text.title: Partnership Co-Marketing Playbook Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: no partnership without partner; identify candidates first
asymmetric; build audience first or find equal-size partner
ship spec with one joint asset + attribution plan + exit criteria

example.trace: candidate_partners >= 1 AND icp_overlap >= 0.6 AND audience_ratio <= 3 → conclusion ref="single-asset-rule" verdict="ship spec with one joint asset + attribution plan + exit criteria"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
